Medicine’s RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). 

The same formulary may be used by more than one plan benefit package (PBP) within a contract. 

SHORT NAME: FORMULARY_ID 

LONG NAME: FORMULARY_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: PDE and CMS HPMS (derived) 

VALUES: 8-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs a formulary characteristics file from the CMS approved formulary data found in 
the CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
